title: elymus canaliculatus
intro: Elymus canaliculatus, also known as the canal-awned wheat grass or Chinese wheat grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elymus canaliculatus include its ability to aid in digestion, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. Elymus canaliculatus can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed fresh or dried to maximize its medicinal properties.
